title: Sus Saver
description: Stop yourself from accidentally breaking Suspicious Sand and Suspicious Gravel
body:
A mod that stops you from breaking Suspicious Sand or Suspicious Gravel, or any blocks in the same column that would cause them to fall and break. No more excavating trail ruins and accidentally breaking a block below and losing your precious suspicious gravel and no more Efficiency 5 shovel mishaps.

It also notifies you how many blocks above the Suspicious Block is. An example may be you're breaking a Terracotta block with 5 gravel above it and 1 Suspicious Gravel on top of that. When trying to break the Terracotta block, it will notify you that there is a Brushable Block 6 blocks above this block.
